scripts.dev: concurrently -n FE,LSP -c blue,green "yarn workspace astra-frontend dev" "yarn workspace astra-language-server dev"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n FE,LSP,JL -c blue,green,magenta "yarn workspace astra-frontend dev" "yarn workspace astra-language-server dev" "julia --project=backend backend/app.jl"
scripts.build: yarn workspace astra-frontend build && yarn workspace astra-language-server build
scripts.install:all: yarn install && cd backend && julia -e "using Pkg; Pkg.instantiate()"
